attacking_style: Opportunistic breakaway rider who capitalizes on pack miscalculations. Shows ability to finish from breaks rather than initiating late attacks.
team_tactics: Benefits from team numerical advantage in breakaways (Gazprom positioned three riders in UAE Tour break), using numbers to control finale before sprint finish.
terrain_preference: Stages suited to breakaways where peloton miscalculates chase timing. Strong enough to survive in breaks, fast enough to outsprint experienced companions.
vulnerability: Limited data, but youth (19 at UAE Tour) suggests potential vulnerability against pure sprinters in reduced bunch finishes or sustained climbs against established GC riders.
key_patterns: Won from breakaway with team numerical advantage, showing tactical awareness beyond years
Outsprinted experienced riders in break finale, indicating strong finishing speed from reduced groups
Precocious tactical maturity noted at age 19, reading race dynamics effectively
form_trajectory: unknown: single observation from early 2022, insufficient recent data to assess current trajectory
